content:
Welcome to the Shake Blog!

Shake Blog is a starter project for building your own static site generator using Shake and Haskell. It produces a blog with posts, standalone pages, tag archives, and an Atom feed of posts.

It is not a turnkey blogging platform. You are expected to fork the codebase and modify it as your site grows — tweak the templates, add new page types, change the URL structure, wire in new build rules.

See the posts below for detailed usage instructions.

Feed
Link to Atom feed of posts
